headline: Abdul Fatawu
body: Ipswich Town have opened talks to sign Leicester winger Abdul Fatawu. Ghana winger attracting interest from several clubs, including in Turkey, Saudi and France. Long-standing appreciation from West Ham as well.🇬🇭
raw_text:
Ipswich Town have opened talks to sign Leicester winger Abdul Fatawu.

Ghana winger attracting interest from several clubs, including in Turkey, Saudi and France. Long-standing appreciation from West Ham as well.🇬🇭
text:
